S.FORM: = Maithripala Sirisena = Mntucing hngkawas 1951 idas 9 jiyax 3 ka Maithripala Sirisena ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Sri lanka ta sayang o kiya ka Maithripala Sirisena, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 1 jiyax 9 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = maitħɾipala siɾisəna = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka maitħɾipala siɾisəna ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan sɾi lanka ta sajaŋ o kija ka maitħɾipala siɾisəna, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Maithripala Sirisena = Mntucing hngkawas 1951 idas 9 jiyax 3 ka Maithripala Sirisena ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Sri lanka ta sayang o kiya ka Maithripala Sirisena, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 1 jiyax 9 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = maitħɾipala siɾisəna = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka maitħɾipala siɾisəna ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan sɾi lanka ta sajaŋ o kija ka maitħɾipala siɾisəna, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
